permissionDefinition.code: Unique key used by route and page guards. Prefer stable snake_case or dot notation.
permissionDefinition.name: Display name shown to administrators when managing permissions.
permissionDefinition.description: Optional internal description for this permission.
permissionDefinition.isActive: Inactive permissions are ignored when user access is evaluated.
permissionDefinition.save: Changes affect role and group authorization flows.

permissionGroup.name: Group name used for identification when assigning to users.
permissionGroup.isSystemAdmin: Members of this group can access all pages and actions without individual permission checks.
permissionGroup.isActive: Inactive groups should not be assigned for new access decisions.
permissionGroup.permissions: Selected permissions define what members of this group can access.
permissionGroup.save: Updates effective access for every user assigned to this group.

userAssignment.user: Select the user whose access scope you want to manage.
userAssignment.groups: The user receives the combined permissions from all selected groups.
userAssignment.save: Assignments take effect immediately for the next authorization checks. Users may need to refresh their session.
userAssignment.systemAdminNote: If the user belongs to a system administrator group, detailed permissions are skipped.

permissionDefinitions.title: Permission definitions
permissionDefinitions.description: Manage permission codes used across the system
